step.title: Load artifact and extract claims
step.action: Read the target artifact and extract all claims, decisions, and assumptions.
If architecture or PRD exists, load them for additional context.

step.title: Assess evidence strength
step.action: For each claim, assess evidence strength: strong, moderate, weak, or none.
Note claims that rely on unstated assumptions or circular reasoning.

step.title: Identify weaknesses
step.action: Identify logical gaps, unaddressed risks, and missing alternatives.
Flag areas where the artifact contradicts itself or ignores edge cases.

step.title: Stress-test assumptions
step.action: Stress-test critical assumptions with failure scenarios.
Model what happens if each key assumption proves false.

step.title: Rate findings by severity
step.action: Rate each finding by severity: critical, high, medium, or low.
Prioritize findings that could derail the project if unaddressed.

step.title: Produce adversarial review report
step.template-output: Apply the template from template.md, filling all sections with adversarial review findings.
